title: Pagination, Filtering, Links, Rate Limits, Versioning, and Resumable Work · Go Client Syst… · Go Semantics Case: Links Versioning Discovery
summary: A cluster inventory traversal follows cursors across thousands of resources, honors quotas, checkpoints progress, and resumes after cancellation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go links versioning discovery increment in a Go 1.26 net/http resumable rate-aware API traversal. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Follow documented links and version boundaries while preventing untrusted relation targets from expanding authority. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Coordinate server guidance, local quotas, concurrency, backoff, and caller priorities without synchronized bursts. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
